objects.label: dining table
objects.long_form_open_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a light–medium stained solid-wood dining table corner with a thick beveled top, carved apron and ornate carved legs; chairs are tucked underneath and small potted plants sit on the tabletop — close view, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
